info.name: cage - Client-side age Encryption Viewer/Editor
info.summary: Client-side viewer and editor for age files
info.description:
cage (Client-side age Encryption) is a secure file viewer/editor for .age encrypted files.
Features: - Client-side encryption/decryption using the age standard - Passphrase-based encryption with scrypt key derivation - Auto-lock timer to protect sensitive data - Mnemonic passphrase generation - Zero server-side access to plaintext content
Security: - All encryption/decryption happens in the browser - Passphrase stored in memory only, never sent to server - Auto-lock clears passphrase and removes decrypted content from DOM
info.author: Jakub Suchý
